text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for summer camp, where racers come to
improve their skills over the summer months.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Yes, yes, got it. I'll try not to get hurt.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Okay, sorted things out with my manager. And
that'll be my last work call for the rest of camp.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: This way I can focus completely on training.
choice_data_list: Do you plan to keep it off the whole time?
Do you plan to keep it off the whole time?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I need to get good enough to wow the crowd in
the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Plus, my manager cleared my schedule for this.
Showing results is the only way to repay her.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
So, once again, I'll be counting on you. Don't go
easy on me!
